landing.heroTitle: Stop missing appointments. Start growing your practice.
landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one platform that eliminates double-bookings, speeds up payments, and keeps your team synchronized.
landing.snapshotOne: Next appointments and therapist availability in one glance.
landing.snapshotTwo: Real-time payments with clean monthly reporting.
landing.snapshotThree: Shared calendar sync with conflict prevention.
landing.productSubtitle: Visual, intuitive, and powerful. Manage everything from one screen.
landing.productPreviewDesc: Appointments, therapists, payments, and analytics unified in a clean interface.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Keep patients happy and your team aligned
landing.featureOneBody: Detect conflicts instantly, suggest available slots, and sync with Google Calendar automatically.
landing.featureTwoBody: Track revenue, expenses, and payment methods with custom month filters and real-time reporting.
landing.featureThreeBody: Set working hours, specialties, and commission rates. Track performance per therapist.
landing.featureFourBody: Two-way Google Calendar sync with therapist tagging and shared calendar support.
landing.stepOneBody: Sign up and configure timezone, currency, and preferences in seconds.
landing.stepTwoBody: Import existing data or create profiles with custom schedules and specialties.
landing.stepThreeBody: Schedule appointments, process payments, and generate reports immediately.
landing.testimonialOneQuote: Cliniker cut our admin time by 40%. No more missed appointments or double-bookings.
landing.testimonialTwoQuote: Google Calendar sync is perfect. Our team stays synchronized without extra effort.
landing.testimonialThreeQuote: Payment tracking and monthly reports save us hours every week. Highly recommended.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your clinic size. Cancel anytime.
landing.pricingBasicDesc: For small clinics just getting started
landing.pricingProDesc: For growing practices with multiple therapists
landing.pricingEnterpriseDesc: For large clinics and multi-location practices
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Cliniker.
landing.faqOneQuestion: How does the free trial work?
landing.faqOneAnswer: Start with a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
landing.faqTwoQuestion: Can I import my existing patient data?
landing.faqTwoAnswer: Yes. You can manually create patient profiles or contact our support team for bulk import assistance.
landing.faqThreeQuestion: Is my data secure and private?
landing.faqThreeAnswer: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption, role-based access controls, and clinic-level data isolation to keep your information secure.
landing.faqFourAnswer: Cliniker requires an internet connection to sync appointments and payments in real-time across your team.
landing.faqFiveQuestion: Can I sync with Google Calendar?
landing.faqFiveAnswer: Yes. Cliniker offers two-way Google Calendar sync with support for shared calendars and therapist-specific event tagging.
landing.securityBody: Your data stays protected with role-based access, audit-friendly records, and secure storage.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of clinics saving time and reducing errors with Cliniker.
landing.footerTagline: Cliniker — built for modern healthcare teams.
